title: Validate improvement tickets for builder consumption (Golden Test 21)
problem: ticket-022 generates improvement tickets from run report failure modes, but Golden Test 21 requires every ticket to include the full builder-consumable field set (title, problem, evidence, affected_modules, expected_files, acceptance_criteria, test_plan, non_goals, risk_level, rollback_plan).
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 21: improvement tickets can be consumed by builder agents.
acceptance_criteria: Every generated improvement ticket includes all Golden Test 21 required fields.
Tickets are specific enough to convert into a branch task with testable acceptance criteria.
non_goals: Do not implement LangGraph or live web discovery.
Do not add public write routes.
Do not implement builder merge gating (Golden Test 22).
